[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000111001 4
1 100110100 4
2 000000000 a
3 001111100 5
4 110100101 5
5 101000100 3
6 111101100 6
7 110000011 4

01 10 111111101 8
12 21 111100101 6
23 32 111101100 6 match 6
34 43 111101111 8
45 54 110111011 7
56 65 110111001 6
67 76 100111101 6
70 07 101111100 6

13 31 111101101 7
24 42 111000111 6
35 53 111111100 7

57 75 110111100 6
